---
title: "Creating Orthoimages and Point Clouds"
id: pp-assessment
order: 100
summary: "Create an orthoimage, inspect it, compute a dense point cloud and mesh, and present the main results."
modules:
  - module-postprocessing
Goals:
  - module-goals-pp
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
activities:
  - activity-metashape-wf-10
  - activity-metashape-wf-11
  - activity-usecase-1
  - activity-odm-09
  - activity-odm-10
  - activity-odm-15
  - activity-fw-21
  - activity-metashape-altum
labels:
  - self-check
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/assessment.md"
---



::: {.callout-warning title="< Things To Do >"}
You can use the provided sample data or your own project data:<br><br>

- Create the first orthoimage with 1 cm or 5 cm ground scan resolution (GSD) according to the contents of this module. <br>
- Perform a visual inspection of the image. Are you satisfied? <br>
- Compute a 3D dense point cloud.<br>
-Compute a mesh with texture as close to reality as possible.<br>
- Prepare a short presentation (preferably online) with your main results and findings.
:::
